S.FORM: Hwang Kyo-ahn I 1957 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Hwang Kyo-ahn, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Korea, south anini i ci Hwang Kyo-ahn, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ńßwaŇč kjo~u-ańßn i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ńßwaŇč kjo~u-ańßn, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ko~ur…ôa, so~uo~u~utńß anini i ¶i ńßwaŇč kjo~u-ańßn, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Hwang Kyo-ahn I 1957 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Hwang Kyo-ahn, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Korea, south anini i ci Hwang Kyo-ahn, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ńßwaŇč kjo~u-ańßn i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ńßwaŇč kjo~u-ańßn, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ko~ur…ôa, so~uo~u~utńß anini i ¶i ńßwaŇč kjo~u-ańßn, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
